no_saved_cards_title:
There are no saved cards yet. 
Go to the main page, search for a city and click on the bookmark to save it.
modal_active_cards_limit_title: If you want to add more cards, you need to delete some of them because you have reached the limit of {{cards}} active cards.
modal_saved_cards_limit_title: If you want to add more cards, you need to delete some of them because you have reached the limit of {{cards}} saved cards.
modal_already_added_title: The card for {{name}} has already been added.
modal_delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete this card?
